Documents drafted, reviewed, signed, and notarized.

Common wills & estate planning questions

Do I need a trust or just a will?

Depends on your assets and goals. A will is enough for many people; a trust avoids probate and can save your family thousands.

How much does a basic estate plan cost?

Significantly less than what your family loses without one. We give flat-rate quotes after the first meeting.

What happens if I die without a will in California?

California's intestacy laws decide who gets what — and it's often not what you'd choose.
